items.title: Trump reinstates Iran port blockade and imposes 20% charge on cargo passing through Hormuz
items.summary: The US president also says Washington will impose a 20% charge on all cargo shipped through the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Rare 20% price drops hit Nomad’s gorgeous metal/glass 25W Qi2 MagSafe stands today
items.summary: There are far more affordable 25W Qi2 MagSafe charging stands out there, but there are almost none quite as premium and gorgeous as the latest Nomad models. They are not cheap, but with the brand’s 2026 Anniversary Sale now live we are now tracking rare price drops on both the 2-in-1 and 3-in-1 models for your entire Apple EDC.

items.title: Apple says former employee exploited ‘rare’ bug to download confidential files after leaving for OpenAI
items.summary: Apple would not comment on the "security breach," which allegedly allowed a former employee to download sensitive files from Apple's network long after he departed the company for rival OpenAI.

items.title: Man wanted in connection with murder arrested in Jordan
items.summary: The body of Jamey Carney was discovered at a property in Killarney, County Kerry, last week.

items.title: Get compact support from the 288Wh Bluetti Elite 30 V2 portable power station while down at $219
items.summary: Through its official Amazon storefront, Bluetti is offering the Elite 30 V2 Portable Power Station in a bunch of colorways starting from $219 shipped, which beats out the direct website by $8, and that’s when using our exclusive code 9TO5TOYS5OFF at checkout, too. While it used to hold a $299 MSRP, it’s been starting lower at $239 since May, when the brand permanently cut prices across its lineup to better match market rates. We’ve mostly seen discounts dropping the cost to this rate both before and after May’s price cuts, though there were slight dips lower to $204 in January and $199 during last month’s Prime Day event. If you missed your chance last month, you’re getting the next-best rate we have tracked since May’s price cuts. Be sure to also check out the Bluetti Summer Power Sale lineup of exclusive deals while it lasts for only a few more days.

items.title: Burton Goods debuts new hybrid leather iPadfolio meets notebook for serious pros [Exclusive deal]
items.summary: Last time we checked in with the team of artisan accessory makers at Burton Goods we featured an exclusive deal on its new stainless steel Apple Watch Ocean Band-style bracelet. But today, the brand is unleashing its all new Leather Padfolio with iPad sleeve and we have an exclusive launch deal on that for you as well.

Alongside all of the deals in its Overstock Sale section, you’re looking at up to 30% off some of its latest-generation gear and a host of rare price drops here on the official site.

items.title: Save $526 today on Samsung’s Odyssey 27-inch 4K 240Hz QD-OLED gaming monitor while it’s down to $774 all-time low

This is regularly a $1,300 display, which is currently fetching $850 at Amazon. Today’s offer at Woot, however, takes an additional $76 off. This 40% discount marks the lowest price we have tracked for this 4K UHD monitor, landing $26 below its previous all-time low.

items.title: ASUS X KOJIMA PRODUCTIONS gaming gear sees first discounts from $55 (Up to $70 off)
items.summary: ASUS teamed up with KOJIMA PRODUCTIONS to debut a range of themed accessories earlier this year, and Best Buy is now offering the first deals on them from $54.99 shipped. The ROG Scabbard II XXL mouse pad can be had for $54.99 shipped right now, down from $70, while the Keris II Origin wireless mouse has dropped to $129.99 shipped from $170. The Delta II wireless headset is also seeing a sizable $70 discount, bringing it down to $199.99 shipped from $270. ASUS also launched a matching ROG Flow Z13-KJP gaming laptop as part of the collection, but that model is currently out of stock and is not included in today’s sale. The rest of the collection can be had for $385 right now, so be sure to snag them after getting more details below.

And what sort of remake are we going to get?

Miroddi XXL Desk Mat with Dual Qi Charging

Buy for $30 (Reg. $70)

What we love

Unlike standard desk mats, this unit boasts not one, but two Qi charging pads. This allows you to easily top off an iPhone and pair of compatible AirPods while you game or tackle tasks at your desk.

items.title: Add this portable air compressor to your ride while it’s $32 (Reg. $45)
items.summary:
GOOLOO GT150 Portable Air Compressor

Buy for $32 (Reg. $45)

What we love

I picked up a portable air compressor several years ago now and it’s still one of my favorite tools. It’s very nice to hook it up, set a desire PSI and let it do the rest. Some smaller units can’t handle car tires, but this one can. It also functions as a power bank, allowing you to top off devices as well.

items.title: NanoMalaysia Reportedly To Begin Production Of Homegrown EV Batteries In July
items.summary:
NanoMalaysia will begin small-scale production of a homegrown graphene-enhanced lithium-ion battery for electric vehicles (EVs) later this month, according to Nikkei Asia. Unlike conventional lithium-ion batteries, it replaces graphite with graphene in the anode, with NanoMalaysia claiming this enables up to three times greater energy storage capacity. According to the report, the project cost around […]

items.title: Reed Jobs would rather talk about curing cancer than his last name
items.summary: When we last sat down with Jobs at TechCrunch Disrupt nearly three years ago, his firm Yosemite was brand new and biotech was still reeling from its post-pandemic crash. Now, the venture outfit has a team of 17; a cluster of blockbuster drugs are all losing patent protection in roughly the same window, creating all kinds of new opportunities; and AI has gone from a curiosity to, in Jobs' words, a huge part of what Yosemite does. "I didn't expect Yosemite to be moving this fast," he said.
